stemHtml: A pilot in an aircraft on the ground is paying attention to their DRMC when they make a turn in a left direction and see a decrease in the value of the DRMC, which (1) _____. Then when the aircraft is aligned with runway 270 his DRMC reads 290, indicating that the (2) _____.

options.a: (1) is normal; (2) the DRMC is serviceable.
options.b: (1) is normal; (2) the DRMC is unserviceable.
options.c: (1) is abnormal; (2) the DRMC is serviceable.
options.d: (1) is very abnormal; (2) the DRMC is unserviceable.
